task.role: You are a Senior Desktop Engineer with expertise in Electron and native integrations. Implement Task 13 with production-quality code.

context.overview: Complete desktop client with settings window, mini popup, and cross-platform builds
context.background: This task is part of a larger project. Key resources: - PRD: .tasks/docs/prd.txt (full requirements and architecture) - Related tasks: 12 - Infrastructure config: Check ConfigMaps for connection strings

requirements.description: Settings window with electron-store, mini notification popup, WebSocket connection, cross-platform build config.

constraints.constraint: Match existing codebase patterns and conventions
Create PR with atomic, well-described commits
Include unit tests for new functionality
PR title format: feat(task-13): Desktop Client Windows & Settings (Spark - Electron)

acceptance_criteria.criterion: All requirements from task description implemented
Code follows project conventions and style guide
Test settings persistence, theme switching, cross-platform builds

deliverables.deliverable: Unit tests covering new code paths
